commands.repair_reason: Maintainer approval is needed for the privacy-sensitive phone-number lookup API, and the contributor must supply real lookup proof from their WhatsApp setup before merge.; Needs attention: The PR adds a plugin-visible WhatsApp LID-to-phone-number lookup and needs explicit maintainer privacy/API approval before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Handle hosted LIDs before calling Baileys — extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/mo... (sha=74d4740170b2e0faad0139562eaec743a07f5fd5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a WhatsApp `ActiveWebListener.lookupPnLidEntry` method and `PnLidEntryResult` type, wires it into the inbound monitor, updates listener mocks, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking patch defects by source inspection: the PR calls Baileys `getPNForLID` for hosted LIDs even though upstream only accepts `@lid`, and it changes resolver ordering relative to current WhatsApp normalization. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer approval is needed for the privacy-sensitive phone-number lookup API, and the contributor must supply real lookup proof from their WhatsApp setup before merge.

target.title: feat(whatsapp): add lookupPnLidEntry API to resolve LID to phone number
target.author: hdzattain
